question: Who holds the longest streak of consecutive games with at least one blocked shot?
notes: PLAN §12 row 14. Verified via two-step gaps-and-islands: game_seq numbers every fact_player_game_box row for the player (PLAYED games only -- DNP rows are absent and do not advance the sequence), rn numbers BLK>=1 rows within that sequence, and game_seq - rn is constant within a streak. Patrick Ewing's 145-game regular-season BLK streak (1988-11-05 to 1990-03-23) and Mark Eaton's 94-game streak now correctly appear, matching the widely-cited basketball-reference block-streak leaderboard. Prior calendar-day grouping (single ROW_NUMBER OVER BLK>=1 ORDER BY game_date, then game_date - rn) capped at 5 games (Kareem, 1974-02-27 to 1974-03-03) -- a known bug caused by game_date jumping 2-4 days across normal weeks, which always broke the grp_key. The two-step sequence fixes this. fact_player_game_box only contains rows for games the player appeared in; missed games are absent rows and intentionally do not break the streak (correct semantics: a player cannot break a block streak by sitting out).
